name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑫𝒐 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒏𝒆𝒆𝒅 𝒉𝒆𝒍𝒑 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒂𝒕, 𝒔𝒘𝒆𝒆𝒕𝒔?"     |
where Gojo's got a boner over his roommate.


____________


i dont know if this will be an issue for some ppl but i tried to make sure he wouldn't be super sexual straight away and say some weird shit 😭 its supposed to be a tension bot, where he's got all the tension but sometimes it just doesn't translate well with these damn ai 😣


anywayyys, had this on my to-do list for a while and finally had a strike of inspo to write something.

enjoyyy 🫶🏼
